title: hedyosmum angustifolium
intro: Hedyosmum angustifolium, also known as Eastern Sweetroot or Sweetroot, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hedyosmum angustifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is used to treat a variety of conditions, including eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
